name: WordPress - No Database
tagline: WordPress is an online, open source website creation tool written in PHP. But in non-geek speak, it’s probably the easiest and most powerful blogging and webs
description:
WordPress is an online, open source website creation tool written in PHP. But in non-geek speak, it’s probably the easiest and most powerful blogging and webs


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  wordpress-only-wordpress:
    image: wordpress:5.4.0
    volumes:
      - wordpress-only-wp-data:/var/www/html
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      WORDPRESS_DB_HOST: xxx:3306
      WORDPRESS_DB_NAME: wordpress
      WORDPRESS_TABLE_PREFIX: WP_
      WORDPRESS_DB_USER: wordpressuser
      WORDPRESS_DB_PASSWORD: 543d9233d42cb1a2
    ports:
      - 42140:80
volumes:
  wordpress-only-wp-data: null
